revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update per [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]
revision.text:
<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 |[[Category:{{{year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] |[[Category:{{{year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]}}
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing all the remaining templates that are needed that have 2 or more uses from english wikipedia
revision.text:
<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 |[[Category:{{{year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] |[[Category:{{{year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]}}
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:{{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 |[[Category:{{year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] |[[Category:{{year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]}}
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:{DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery

  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 |[[Category:{year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] |[[Category:{year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]}}
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 |[[Category:year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] |[[Category:year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]}}
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 |[[Category:year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] |[[Category:year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]}}
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 |[[Category:year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] |[[Category:year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]}}
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

* continent = {{{continent}}}

   ######## End header text

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- ;Diagnostics * year = {{{year}}} * continent = {{{continent}}} --><includeonly><!-- # Portals -->{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}<!-- ######## Begin header text # link to country needs some trickery -->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}<!-- # link to main article, but only if it exists -->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}} <!-- ######## End header text -->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}} {{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}} | y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories --> | #default = <!-- do categories -->
{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 | |}}
}} __NOGALLERY__ </includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:year}}}|{{{continent}}}]] [[Category:year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]] [[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]] [[Category:DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<!--
;Diagnostics
* year = {{{year}}}
* continent = {{{continent}}}
--><includeonly><!--
  # Portals
-->{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}<!--
   ######## Begin header text
   # link to country needs some trickery
-->{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}<!--
  # link to main article, but only if it exists
-->{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
<!--
   ######## End header text
-->{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = <!-- nocat=Yes, so no categories -->
| #default = <!-- do categories -->

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 | |}}

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

[[Category:year}}}|{{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Portal|Geography| {{#ifexist: Portal:{{{continent}}} | {{{continent}}} }} | {{FindYDCportal|{{{year}}}}} }}{{Category explanation|topics specifically related to the year '''[[{{{year}}}]]''' in '''[[{{{continent}}}]]'''}}{{#ifexist:{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}|{{Cat main|{{{year}}} in {{{continent}}}}}}}
{{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes|min={{{min|}}}}}
{{#switch: {{lc:{{{nocat|}}}}}
| y | yes = 
| #default = 

{{#ifexpr: {{{year}}} <= 1500 | |}}

}}
__NOGALLERY__
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content={{High-use}}This is a sub-template of [[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}

[[Category:year}}}|{{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:year}}} by continent|{{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:Years of the {{ordinal|{{Century|{{{year}}}}}}} century in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:DECADE|{{{year}}}}} in {{{continent}}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
